title: Licences, authorizations and registrations for drug and health products - Canada.ca
content:
## Licences, authorizations and registrations for drug and health products
Information on applying for licences, drug submission requirements, clinical trials and selling veterinarian drugs.

## Services and information

### Clinical Trials Database
Browse this database for information on Canadian clinical trials involving human pharmaceutical and biological drugs.

### Drug and health product fees and submission requirements
Information on complying with regulations, and drug submission fees and amendments.

### Licence, authorization and registration forms for drug and health products
Guidance documents for drug, medical device, natural health product and site licensing. Also find blood establishment, donor semen, cell, tissue and organ registration information.
